nodes.label: Core payment processing engine.          Handles:     - Receipts (money in)
Process a receipt (money coming in).                  Returns dict with succes
Process a payment (money going out).                  Returns dict with succes
Process a transfer between payment accounts.                  Returns dict wit
Process a refund for a previous transaction.                  Returns dict wit
Create a settlement batch.                  Returns dict with success status a
Validate that required accounting accounts exist.                  Returns lis
Create journal entry for a receipt.
Create journal entry for a payment.
Create journal entry for a transfer.
Get all transactions for a payment account.
